name: sharenow
description: Publish websites and store private agent files.

interface.shortDescription: Publish websites and store private agent files.
interface.longDescription: sharenow lets agents publish websites, apps, and files, and store private files in cloud Drives. Publish HTML apps, documents, images, PDFs, videos, and static files to live URLs at {slug}.sharenow.today or custom domains, or use private cloud Drives for agent files. Supports passwords, custom domains, Site Data, analytics, profiles, and more.
